title: Felt Christmas Tree For Kids,2.8ft Fuzzy Felt Wall Mounted Hanging Xmas Tree With 34pcs Detachable Candy Ornaments,Toddlers Xmas Gifts For Wall/Door Home Christmas Decorations Indoor Xmas Activities
features: 🎅CHRISTMAS WALL DECORATIONS: You will receive a 2.8-foot-tall felt christmas tree with 34 removable decorations (santa , snowmen, reindeer, penguins,christmas candles,sleigh). It is the ideal choice for creating the perfect xmas festive atmosphere and easily infusing your home with christmas cheer.

🎄EXCELLENT QUALITY: Our diy christmas tree decorations is made from thick felt fabric, which is sturdy and durable. Key joints are reinforced with strong stitching to prevent damage from children tearing, ensuring a safe and enjoyable decorating experience.

🦌PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFTS:Give your children this popular felt christmas tree and let them choose and hang cute christmas decorations themselves, effectively exercising their hands-on and coordination skills. The whole family can participate together, creating a warm atmosphere of cooperation and adding to the joy of the christmas party.

🎁EASY ATTACH TO/TAKE OFF: Quickly decorate for christmas anytime, anywhere! This portable felt christmas tree features a unique hook-and-loop design with a built-in hanging rope, allowing you to easy attachment. It folds up for easy transport and storage, making it perfect for christmas parties.

🔔SERVICE GUARANTEE：Please feel free to contact us with any questions about our products. We will respond to your questions as soon as possible and provide you with personalised answers and support. Your satisfaction is at the heart of our service.
